posts.title: Formation Movement (pyramids)
posts.body: Watch the animation below to understand exactly how our formation moves — both in attack (upsidedown pyramid) and in defence (pyramid). Study the movement of your specific position.

posts.title: Build-up ideas
posts.body: Two animations showing our build-up combinations. Watch the **Stringer as Kolona** — when she receives with her back to goal she creates a skulaki square, triggering the FullBack and CM to make their runs.

posts.title: Pressing Idea
posts.body: Our pressing system — when to press, who presses, and how the rest of the team shifts to cut passing lanes. Stringers press the ball, everyone else marks individually.
